title: Fix scorecard_from_question_export runtime errors (Observer.reset + File.read determinism)

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting hotfix for runtime failure. Plan: remove Observer.reset() (unsupported DSPy handle method) and wrap File.read in Step.checkpoint for deterministic replay compliance.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Fix implemented: removed unsupported Observer.reset() call and wrapped questions_export_path File.read in Step.checkpoint for deterministic replay. Validation passed: YAML parse + pytest plexus/cli/procedure/test_service_yaml_loader.py.
